title: cymbidium longipes
intro: Cymbidium longipes, also known as the Australian cymbidium or the rock lily, is a species of orchid native to eastern Australia. It is a terrestrial orchid that grows in rocky areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is sometimes used to treat colds and flu. Cymbidium longipes is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
